languages.text: "И вот подписанный Лже-Императором документ, основа всей твой власти, Чемпион, лежит под ногами, словно поверженный враг. Что это значит для тебя теперь, {name}? Что символ династии и благоволения Трупа-на-Троне пробуждает в твоей душе? Прислушайся к себе — и услышишь шепот Пантеона".

"And so the document signed by the False Emperor, the basis of all your power, Champion, lies beneath your feet like a vanquished foe. What does this mean to you now, {name}? What does the symbol of the dynasty and the favour of the corpse on the throne awaken in your soul? Listen to yourself — and you will hear the whispers of the Pantheon."
languages.original_text: "И вот подписанный Лже-Императором документ, основа всей твой власти, Чемпион, лежит под ногами, словно поверженный враг. Что это значит для тебя теперь, {name}? Что символ династии и благоволения Трупа-на-Троне пробуждает в твоей душе? Прислушайся к себе — и услышишь шепот Пантеона".

What does the symbol of the dynasty and the favour of the corpse on the throne awaken in your soul? Listen to yourself — and you will hear the whispers of the Pantheon."

"And so the document signed by the False Emperor, the basis of all your power, Champion, lies beneath your feet like a vanquished foe. What does this mean to you now, {name}? What does the symbol of the dynasty and the favour of the corpse on the throne awaken in your soul? Listen to yourself — and you will hear the whispers of the Pantheon."

"And so the document signed by the False Emperor, the basis of all your power, Champion, lies beneath your feet like a vanquished foe. What does this mean to you now, {name}? What does the symbol of the dynasty and the favour of the corpse on the throne awaken in your soul? Listen to yourself — and you will hear the whispers of the Pantheon."

languages.text: 「偽皇帝が署名した文書、つまり君たちの権力の根幹が、敗れた敵のように君たちの足元にある。今、君たちにとってこれは何を意味するのか、{名前}。王朝と死者の恩寵の象徴が、君たちの魂に何を呼び覚ますのか。君自身の心に耳を傾けよ。そうすれば、パンテオンのささやきを聞くことができるだろう」
languages.original_text: "And so the document signed by the False Emperor, the basis of all your power, Champion, lies beneath your feet like a vanquished foe. What does this mean to you now, {name}? What does the symbol of the dynasty and the favour of the corpse on the throne awaken in your soul? Listen to yourself — and you will hear the whispers of the Pantheon."

traits.locale_text: 「偽皇帝が署名した文書、つまり君たちの権力の根幹が、敗れた敵のように君たちの足元にある。今、君たちにとってこれは何を意味するのか、{名前}。王朝と死者の恩寵の象徴が、君たちの魂に何を呼び覚ますのか。君自身の心に耳を傾けよ。そうすれば、パンテオンのささやきを聞くことができるだろう。」

languages.text: «Y así, el documento firmado por el falso Emperador, la base de tu poder, está a tus pies como un enemigo vencido, campe{mf|ón|ona}. ¿Qué significa esto para ti, {name}? ¿Qué despiertan el símbolo de tu dinastía y el favor del cadáver en el trono en tu alma? Escúchate a ti mism{mf|o|a} y oirás los susurros del Panteón».
languages.original_text: "And so the document signed by the False Emperor, the basis of all your power, Champion, lies beneath your feet like a vanquished foe. What does this mean to you now, {name}? What does the symbol of the dynasty and the favour of the corpse on the throne awaken in your soul? Listen to yourself — and you will hear the whispers of the Pantheon."

traits.locale_text: «Y así, el documento firmado por el falso Emperador, la base de tu poder, está a tus pies como un enemigo vencido, campe{mf|ón|ona}. ¿Qué significa esto para ti, {name}? ¿Qué despiertan el símbolo de tu dinastía y el favor del cadáver en el trono en tu alma? Escúchate a ti mism{mf|o|a} y oirás los susurros del Panteón».

languages.text: "Und so liegt das vom falschen Imperator unterzeichnete Dokument, die Basis all Eurer Macht, Champion, unter Euren Füßen wie ein zertrampelter Feind. Was sagt Ihr dazu, {name}? Was weckt das Symbol der Dynastie und die Gefälligkeit des Leichnams auf dem Thron in Eurer Seele? Hört in Euch hinein ... und Ihr werdet das Flüstern des Pantheons hören."
languages.original_text: "And so the document signed by the False Emperor, the basis of all your power, Champion, lies beneath your feet like a vanquished foe. What does this mean to you now, {name}? What does the symbol of the dynasty and the favour of the corpse on the throne awaken in your soul? Listen to yourself — and you will hear the whispers of the Pantheon."

traits.locale_text: "Und so liegt das vom falschen Imperator unterzeichnete Dokument, die Basis all Eurer Macht, Champion, unter Euren Füßen wie ein zertrampelter Feind. Was sagt Ihr dazu, {name}? Was weckt das Symbol der Dynastie und die Gefälligkeit des Leichnams auf dem Thron in Eurer Seele? Hört in Euch hinein ... und Ihr werdet das Flüstern des Pantheons hören."

languages.text: « Donc, {mf|champion|championne}, vous êtes en train de fouler au pied le document signé de la main de votre faux empereur, soit l'origine de tout votre pouvoir. Qu'est-ce que tout cela signifie pour vous, {name} ? Est-ce que le symbole de la dynastie et de la faveur du cadavre sur le trône a éveillé quelque chose dans les tréfonds de votre âme ? Écoutez-vous... et vous entendrez les murmures du Panthéon. »
languages.original_text: "And so the document signed by the False Emperor, the basis of all your power, Champion, lies beneath your feet like a vanquished foe. What does this mean to you now, {name}? What does the symbol of the dynasty and the favour of the corpse on the throne awaken in your soul? Listen to yourself — and you will hear the whispers of the Pantheon."

traits.locale_text: « Donc, {mf|champion|championne}, vous êtes en train de fouler au pied le document signé de la main de votre faux empereur, soit l'origine de tout votre pouvoir. Qu'est-ce que tout cela signifie pour vous, {name} ? Est-ce que le symbole de la dynastie et de la faveur du cadavre sur le trône a éveillé quelque chose dans les tréfonds de votre âme ? Écoutez-vous... et vous entendrez les murmures du Panthéon. »

languages.text: “看啊，勇士，这份由虚假的帝皇签署、构成你一切权力根基的文件，如今就像被击败的敌人一样匍匐在你脚下。这对你意味着什么，{name}？这件王朝的象征，以及宝座上那具尸体所赐予的恩宠，在你灵魂中唤醒了什么？仔细聆听你自己的声音——你将听到万神殿的低语。”
languages.original_text: "And so the document signed by the False Emperor, the basis of all your power, Champion, lies beneath your feet like a vanquished foe. What does this mean to you now, {name}? What does the symbol of the dynasty and the favour of the corpse on the throne awaken in your soul? Listen to yourself — and you will hear the whispers of the Pantheon."

traits.locale_text: “看啊，勇士，这份由虚假的帝皇签署、构成你一切权力根基的文件，如今就像被击败的敌人一样匍匐在你脚下。这对你意味着什么，{name}？这件王朝的象征，以及宝座上那具尸体所赐予的恩宠，在你灵魂中唤醒了什么？仔细聆听你自己的声音——你将听到万神殿的低语。”

languages.text: "Tüm gücünün temeli olan Sahte İmparator'un imzaladığı belge, yenilmiş bir düşman gibi ayaklarının altında yatıyor Müdafi. Bu senin için ne ifade ediyor {name}? Hanedanlığın sembolü ve tahttaki cesedin lütfu, ruhunda ne uyandırıyor? Kendini dinle... Panteon'un fısıltılarını duyacaksın."
languages.original_text: "And so the document signed by the False Emperor, the basis of all your power, Champion, lies beneath your feet like a vanquished foe. What does this mean to you now, {name}? What does the symbol of the dynasty and the favour of the corpse on the throne awaken in your soul? Listen to yourself — and you will hear the whispers of the Pantheon."
